verses.text: Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna dang khat zangin thu hilh a
“Vantung ki-ukna zia pen a tapa-a' dingin mo pawi a bawl kumpipa' gamtatzia tawh kibang hi
Mo pawi siim dingin a khohsa mite a sam dingin a nasemte sawl a, ahi zongin kuamah pailo hi

Tua ciangin nasem dangte sawl leuleu a, ‘Ka khohsaksa mite kiangah hih bangin va gen un: Ka bawngtalte leh ka bawngno thaute kigo khin a, nitak an a minsa-in a om banah, na khempeuh a mansa-in om khinta hi. Mo pawi an ne dingin hong pai ta un, ci hi, ci-in va gen un,’ a ci hi
Ahi zongin a khohsa mite in na thusimlo uh a, pawlkhat in lo na kuansanin, pawlkhat in a sumbukah na paisanin
adangte in a nasemte manin a na satgawp khit uh ciangin a na that uh hi
Kumpipa zong heh mahmah a, a galkapte kuansakin tua mi thatte a thahsak khit ciangin a khua a haltumsak hi
Tua ciangin a nasemte kiangah, ‘Mo pawi an a baihsa-in om a, ahi zongin ka sap mite a ne dingin a kilawmlo mi a suak uh hi
Tua ahih manin lamlianpi-ah va pai un la, mi na muh zahzah uh hong sam un,’ a ci hi
Nasemte zong lamlianpi-ah va pai uh a, mihoih mi hoihlo ciloin a muh khempeuh uh va kaikhawm uh ahih manin mo pawi bawlna innsung dimin leengla hong om hi
“Kumpipa, a leenglate a en dingin a hong lut ciangin mo pawi siimna puan a silhlo mi khat a mu hi
Ama kiangah, ‘Lawm aw, mo pawi siimna puan silhlopi-in hih lai-ah hong bangci luttheih na hi hiam?’ a cih ciangin tua mipa in a cihna ding a thei kei hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in a nasemte kiangah, ‘A khut a khe hen un la, pualam khuamialna lakah lawnkhia un; tua lai-ah kapin a hagawi ding hi,’ a ci hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh mi tampi a kisap hangin tawm bek a kiteel hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Farisi mite paikhia uh a, a kampauna tawh Jesuh a mat theihna dingun thu a kikum uh hi

Amau' nungzuite leh Herod mi pawlkhat, Jesuh kiangah a paisak uh hi. Amaute in, “Sia aw, thu ahi bang a gen tawntung na hihna thu ka thei uh hi. Mite kuamah zahtaktuam neilo na hih manin midangte' pauding bangmah phamawhsa loin Pasian in mite' gamtat ding a deihna bangin tangtakin thu na hilh tawntung hi
Tua ahih ciangin Rom kumpipa Sisar tungah siah i piak ding kilawm hiam, na ngaihsutna nong genna dingin ka deih uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in amau' gitloh geelna thei ahih manin, “Mihoih a kineihkhem mite aw, bang hangin kei hong thangsiah se na hi uh hiam
Siahin na piakding uh sum hong lak dih un,” a cih ciangin sumtang peek khat hong paipih uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Hih sum tungah kua lim leh kua min om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin
amaute in, “Sisar' lim leh a min kigelh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Sisar' nate Sisar' tungah na pia un la, Pasian' nate Pasian' tungah na pia un,” a ci hi
Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin lamdangsa mahmah uh a, ama kiang panin a paikhia uh hi.
Tua ni mahin, misite thawhkikna omlo hi, ci-in a um Saddusi mite pawlkhat Jesuh kiangah hong pai uh a
“Sia aw, Moses in, ‘Mi khat ta neiloin a sih leh tua a si mipa' khang a kizop theihna dingin a naupa in a u' zi luah ta hen,’ ci hi
Tu-in kote lakah unau pasal sagih om ngei hi. A u pen in zi nei a, ta neiloin si ahih manin ama zi a naupa in a luah hi
Tua mah bangin a nihna, a thumna-a kipan a sagihna dongin ta neiloin a si uh hi
Tua unau pasal sagihte a sih khit ciangin a numei zong a si hi
Tua ahih manin tua unau pasal sagihte in tuanu ten'pihkim uh ahih manin, thawhkik hun ciangin a koi pen' zi hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Note in Lai Siangtho thu ahi a, Pasian' vangliatna ahi zongin theilo na hih manun na ngaihsunkhial uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh misite a thawhkik uh ciangin vantungah a om vantung mite tawh kibang ding uh a, zinei pasalnei cih omlo ding hi
Misite thawhkikna thu tawh kisai-in note tungah a gen thute sim ngeilo na hi uh hiam
Pasian in, ‘Kei pen Abraham' Pasian, Isaac' Pasian, Jakob' Pasian ka hi hi,’ ci hi. Pasian pen a si mite' Pasian hiloin a nungta mite' Pasian ahi hi,” a ci hi
Mihonte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin ama thuhilhna hangin lamdang a sa uh hi.
Ahi zongin Farisi mite in, Saddusi mite' thudotna Jesuh in dongkhakin, Saddusi mite in a cihna ding mel uh a theih nawnlohna thu a zak uh ciangin Jesuh kiangah a hong pai uh hi
Amaute sung panin Thukham hilh siate khat in Jesuh a thangsiahna-in thu hong dong a
“Sia aw, thukham khempeuh sung panin bang thukham lianpen ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Jesuh in, “Na Topa Pasian na lungsim khempeuh, na nuntakna khempeuh, leh na pilna khempeuh tawh na it ding hi, cihna ahi hi
Hih pen a masapen, a lianpen thukham ahi hi
A nihna pen a masa mah tawh kibang a, nangma pumpi na it bangin na vengte na it in, cihna ahi hi
Hih thukham nihte tung panin thukham dang khempeuh leh kamsangte' thuhilhna khempeuh a hong mengkhia ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Tua bangin Farisi mite hong kikaihkhop laitakin Jesuh in amaute kiangah
“Note in Khrih kua hi ci a, kua' suan hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute in, “David' suan hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Tua ahih leh bang hangin David mahmah in Pasian' Kha' sawlna tawh
‘Topa in keima Topa tungah thu gen a: Na galte, na khe nuai-ah ka koih matengin ka taklamah na tu in,’ ci hi, ci-in thu na gen a, Khrih pen ka Topa ci ahi hiam
David in Khrih pen Topa ci ahih leh bang hangin Khrih pen David' suan hi thei ding ahi hiam?” ci-in thu a dong hi
Kuamah in ama thudotna kamkhat beek dawng theilo uh hi. Tua huna kipanin kuamah in Jesuh kiangah thu a dong ngam nawn kei uh hi.
